name: vacation_mode_full_lifecycle
description: Home → vacation at 10:00 (deep setback applied); three classification cycles fire and reapply vacation setback; user returns at 16:00 (comfort restored). Verifies vacation setback depth and classification-cycle setback maintenance.
notes: VACATION_SETBACK_EXTRA = 3.0F. setback_cool=79, so vacation cool target = 79 + 3 = 82F.
Classification cycles while vacation call _handle_occupancy_vacation() → 'setback_applied' each time.
comfort_restored fires on occupancy_home with comfort_cool=74F.
Covers Priority 4 vacation lifecycle from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Morning classification at home — cool mode, comfort_cool=74F
User leaves for vacation — deep cool setback: setback_cool(79) + VACATION_SETBACK_EXTRA(3) = 82F
30-min classification cycle while on vacation — must reapply vacation setback (82F), NOT comfort
Second classification cycle while on vacation — setback maintained
Third classification cycle while on vacation — setback maintained

assertions.reason: Initial morning classification at home — cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
Classification while vacation reapplies vacation setback (82F) — comfort NOT restored
Second classification cycle while vacation — setback maintained at 82F
Third classification cycle while vacation — setback maintained at 82F

verdict.summary: Vacation sets deep setback; classification cycles maintain it; return restores comfort
verdict.observed_behavior: setback_applied (82F) on vacation and each classification cycle; comfort_restored (74F) on return
verdict.expected_behavior: Deep vacation setback maintained across classification cycles; full comfort restore on home return
